name: Start Online · Finish On Campus
ideal: Universities with strong tech/business profile that can release a cohort for 2 months. Real challenges with Italian companies.

name: One Week H-FARM · One Week Home
ideal: Universities wanting a quick, intense hybrid experience without releasing a full cohort. Italian company visits.
case: FIT NYC: 'AI and the New Fashion Value Chain' (Venice + NYC)

name: Startup Bootcamp
ideal: Universities with strong entrepreneurship centres or eager to build one. Real-project teamwork with H-FARM Startup Center experts.

name: Global Entrepreneurship Program
ideal: Top-tier universities (MBA, advanced business) wanting the deepest immersion: theory + company visits + idea-scouting with managers.

name: Exchange Program
ideal: Established mutual-exchange partnerships. Two-way student flow.

name: J-Term
ideal: US/Canadian universities with January mini-term. Single-course full focus.
case: Designed for North American academic calendars
